message:
fix: improve tab overview layout and styling

- Close button on left, title centered with spacer
- Smaller title bar (0 top/bottom padding, 11px font)
- Close buttons show on hover only, always visible on mobile
- Use 768px mobile breakpoint consistently
- Dynamic preview width based on actual panel aspect ratio
- Overview background uses config color (color-mix with black)
- Top-left alignment with proper spacing
- Fix panel resize after reparenting for correct split dimensions
